title: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
summary_full: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.
summary_public: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.

PL.label: negative
PL.evidence: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
